description: Ralph work queue for the Slay the Spire 2 Emulator project. Add concrete user stories here before running Ralph.

userStories.title: Create emulator completion plan
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a clear plan.md that defines the remaining work needed to make the emulator more complete and reliable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create plan.md at the repository root
Summarize current emulator scope from README and source structure
List missing emulator systems and prioritize them
Break remaining work into actionable implementation milestones
Do not change runtime behavior

userStories.title: Implement highest-priority emulator gap from plan
userStories.description: As a user, I want the highest-priority missing emulator behavior from plan.md implemented so simulation coverage improves.
acceptanceCriteria: Read plan.md and select the highest-priority incomplete implementation item
Implement the selected emulator behavior with focused changes
Add or update tests for the implemented behavior
Run bash lint-and-test.sh successfully
Update plan.md to mark the item complete or record remaining work

userStories.title: Expand combat behavior coverage
userStories.description: As a user, I want more Slay the Spire 2 combat mechanics modeled accurately in the native emulator.
acceptanceCriteria: Select the next highest-priority combat mechanic from plan.md
Implement the mechanic in the C# emulator
Expose any required state through interop or observations if needed
Add regression tests
Run bash lint-and-test.sh successfully
Update plan.md

userStories.title: Expand run-level behavior coverage
userStories.description: As a user, I want more run-level systems modeled so training and evaluation better approximate real Slay the Spire 2 runs.
acceptanceCriteria: Select the next highest-priority run-level system from plan.md
Implement deterministic game behavior in the C# emulator and touch Python only for bindings or wrappers
Keep observations/actions backward-compatible unless plan.md explicitly justifies a change
Add or update tests
Run bash lint-and-test.sh successfully
Update plan.md
